title: From our teams, to the world.
description: Announcements, hiring updates, and links to Costco's broader programs.

items.title: Costco announces its first Global Capability Center in India.
items.excerpt: A purpose-built engine in Hyderabad to power Costco's technology and operations worldwide. Initial scale: ~1,000 employees.
items.imageAlt: Aerial view of Hyderabad's HITEC City skyline at dusk, with modern glass towers lining the tech corridor
items.credit: Photo by Aman Upadhyay on Unsplash

items.title: Hiring across engineering, data, AI, cloud, security, and quality.
items.excerpt: All India GCC openings are facilitated by Talent500. See the Careers section for live roles, or jump straight to the official portal.
items.imageAlt: Diverse team of engineers collaborating around a laptop in a modern, naturally lit workspace
items.credit: Photo by Mimi Thian on Unsplash

items.title: Climate Action Plan: net-zero by 2050; SBTi-aligned 2030 targets.
items.excerpt: Costco committed to net-zero across the value chain, with a 39% Scope 1+2 reduction and a 20% Scope 3 intensity reduction by 2030.
items.imageAlt: Wind turbines on a green hillside catching first light at sunrise, low cloud in the valleys
items.credit: Photo by Karsten Wurth on Unsplash
